metadata.documentation: Amazon Timestream for InfluxDB is a managed time-series database engine that makes it easy for application developers and DevOps teams to run InfluxDB databases on AWS for near real-time time-series applications using open-source APIs. With Amazon Timestream for InfluxDB, it is easy to set up, operate, and scale time-series workloads that can answer queries with single-digit millisecond query response time.
